name: Overnight Oats with Dates
description: Rolled oats soaked in milk with chopped dates, chia seeds, and honey. High in fiber for sustained energy and naturally sweet.

name: Egg & Avocado Toast
description: Whole grain toast topped with mashed avocado and a boiled egg. Healthy fats and protein keep you full longer.

name: Banana Peanut Butter Smoothie
description: Blended banana, peanut butter, milk, and a handful of oats. Quick, filling, and rich in potassium.

name: Greek Yogurt Parfait
description: Layers of Greek yogurt, granola, mixed berries, and a drizzle of honey. Protein-packed and hydrating.

name: Whole Wheat Paratha with Yogurt
description: Flaky whole wheat flatbread served with plain yogurt and a side of cucumber. A traditional sehri staple.

name: Oatmeal with Almonds & Banana
description: Warm oatmeal topped with sliced banana, almonds, and cinnamon. Slow-releasing carbs for all-day energy.

name: Scrambled Eggs with Spinach
description: Fluffy eggs with fresh spinach and whole grain toast. Iron and protein-rich to power your fast.

name: Date & Walnut Energy Balls
description: No-bake balls of dates, walnuts, oats, and coconut. Easy to prep ahead and naturally energizing.

name: Ful Medames (Fava Beans)
description: Stewed fava beans with olive oil, lemon, and cumin. A Middle Eastern sehri classic, incredibly filling.

name: Sweet Potato & Egg Bowl
description: Roasted sweet potato cubes with a fried egg and avocado. Complex carbs plus healthy fats.

name: Chicken & Rice Porridge
description: Savory rice porridge with shredded chicken, ginger, and green onions. Warm, hydrating, and satisfying.

name: Whole Wheat Pancakes
description: Fluffy pancakes made with whole wheat flour, topped with banana slices and a touch of maple syrup.

name: Hummus & Veggie Wrap
description: Whole wheat wrap with hummus, cucumber, tomatoes, and lettuce. Light yet sustaining with plant protein.

name: Cheese & Date Plate
description: Sliced cheese with dates, whole grain crackers, and almonds. Simple, no-cook, and perfectly balanced.

name: Lentil Soup with Bread
description: Hearty red lentil soup with warm bread. Packed with protein and fiber for sustained energy.

name: Smoothie Bowl
description: Thick blended açaí or mixed berry base topped with granola, banana, and coconut flakes. Hydrating and nutritious.

name: Shakshuka (Eggs in Tomato)
description: Poached eggs in spiced tomato sauce with whole grain bread for dipping. Warm and protein-rich.

name: Muesli with Milk & Dried Fruits
description: Untoasted muesli with cold milk, raisins, and dried apricots. Easy to prepare and fiber-rich.

name: Tuna & Cucumber Sandwich
description: Whole wheat bread with tuna salad and cucumber slices. Omega-3s and protein to fuel your day.

name: Rice Pudding with Cardamom
description: Creamy rice pudding with cardamom and pistachios. A comforting sehri treat with sustained-release carbs.

name: Egg Muffins with Vegetables
description: Pre-made egg muffins with bell peppers, onions, and cheese. Meal-prep friendly and grab-and-go.

name: Watermelon & Feta Plate
description: Cubed watermelon with feta cheese and mint. Extremely hydrating — perfect for longer fasting days.

name: Almond Butter & Banana Toast
description: Whole grain toast with almond butter and banana slices. Quick, delicious, and full of healthy fats.

name: Chicken Shawarma Wrap
description: Leftover shawarma in a whole wheat wrap with pickles and garlic sauce. Protein-heavy and satisfying.

name: Cottage Cheese & Fruit Bowl
description: Cottage cheese with fresh mango, berries, and a sprinkle of chia seeds. High protein and refreshing.

name: Bean & Cheese Quesadilla
description: Whole wheat tortilla with refried beans and cheese. Simple, filling, and fiber-rich.

name: Coconut Water & Date Plate
description: Coconut water for hydration with a plate of dates and mixed nuts. Nature's electrolyte drink.

name: Veggie Omelette
description: Three-egg omelette with mushrooms, tomatoes, and cheese. Low-carb but incredibly sustaining.

name: Quinoa Breakfast Bowl
description: Warm quinoa with milk, honey, walnuts, and cinnamon. Complete protein from a single grain.

name: Celebration Sehri Spread
description: A mix of favorites: dates, yogurt, toast with honey, fresh fruit, and plenty of water. A grateful last sehri.
